strengths: 15+ years across web, backend, distributed systems and embedded
Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role
Founder experience building event-driven platform deployed on Kubernetes
concerns: No demonstrated executive (CTO/VP) leadership or scaling teams from 10 to 30+
No production multi-agent AI systems or fintech credit/risk infrastructure experience shown
Limited regulated-finance background; fintech exposure is brief and not infrastructure-level
response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior/staff engineer with broad full-stack and distributed systems experience, some exposure to agentic AI tooling, and brief fintech contact via RIDE Capital. However, the role demands an executive with a track record of scaling engineering organizations, governing hybrid delivery models, and operating production multi-agent AI systems in regulated financial contexts — none of which are evidenced in the resume.
